Explicitly required by export_result.sh and verifier.py.
install_urbansim.sh downloads this dataset from the UDST github repository and setup_task.sh loads it via pandas HDFStore.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world San Francisco parcel data from the UDST GitHub repository (sanfran_public.h5). It successfully verifies that the expected Jupyter notebook, output CSV, and PNG paths match the explicit requirements checked by the export_result.sh and verifier.py logic. The expected columns for the CSV output (zone_id, total_buildings, pre_1940_count, pre_1940_pct, median_year_built) are also perfectly aligned with the exact verifier logic. Running an independent Pandas analysis confirms that the HDF5 dataset contains 149,488 valid building records with top aging infrastructure zones calculable (e.g. Zone 6 has the highest pre-1940 percentage at 97.08%).
